label: Verify SSH login
description: Connects over SSH and confirms login works by echoing a marker and the username.

label: Run any command
description: Runs a single command on the target and shows its output.

label: System uptime
description: Shows how long the target has been running.

label: Hostname
description: Prints the target's hostname.

label: Current user
description: Prints which user the SSH session is logged in as.

label: List root directory
description: Long-lists the contents of / on the target.

label: Print a file (cat)
description: Prints the contents of a file on the target.

label: Check a process is running (Linux)
description: Passes if a process matching the name is listed by ps.

label: Check a process is running (QNX)
description: QNX variant — passes if 'pidin' lists the process.

label: Kill a process
description: Stops a process by name (tries pkill, then QNX 'slay').

label: Start a service (systemd)
description: Starts a systemd service on the target.

label: Restart a service (systemd)
description: Restarts a systemd service on the target.

label: Service status (systemd)
description: Shows the status of a systemd service.

label: Disk space
description: Shows free/used disk space (df -h).

label: Memory usage
description: Shows memory usage (free -m, falling back to /proc/meminfo).

label: CPU load snapshot
description: One-shot top to see current CPU/process load.

label: Make a directory
description: Creates a directory (mkdir -p) on the target.

label: Remove a file
description: Deletes a file on the target.

label: Change permissions (chmod)
description: Makes a file executable (or sets any mode).

label: Grep a pattern in a log
description: Searches a log for a pattern and shows the last matches.

label: Ping from the target
description: Pings an address from the target and passes on 0% packet loss.

label: Network interfaces
description: Lists network interfaces and addresses (ip addr / ifconfig).

label: Read date / time
description: Prints the target's current date and time.

label: Upload a file (SFTP)
description: Sends a local file to the target over SFTP.

label: Download a file → attach
description: Pulls a file off the target and attaches it to the run's report.

label: Remount filesystem read-write
description: Remounts a mount point read-write (e.g. to edit a read-only rootfs).

label: Show mounted filesystems
description: Lists what's currently mounted.

label: Mount a USB drive
description: Mounts /dev/sda1 to /mnt/usb on the target.

label: Unmount a path
description: Unmounts a mounted path on the target.

label: Run a command as root (sudo)
description: Runs a command with sudo (non-interactive).

label: Sync the filesystem
description: Flushes pending writes to disk (sync) — useful before a reboot/power-off.

label: Environment variables
description: Lists the target's environment variables, sorted.

label: Capture journalctl → attach
description: Grabs the last N journald log lines and attaches them to the report.

label: Capture slog2info (QNX) → attach
description: Grabs the QNX slog2info buffer and attaches it to the report.

label: Check a file exists (pass/fail)
description: Passes only if the given path exists on the target.

label: List a directory
description: Long-lists a directory on the target.

label: Tail a log file → attach
description: Reads the last N lines of a file and attaches them to the report.

label: Check a process/service is running
description: Passes if a process matching the name is running (pgrep).

label: Reboot the host
description: Reboots the target (doesn't fail just because the SSH connection drops).

label: Pass if output matches (wildcard)
description: Runs a command and passes only if the output matches a wildcard pattern.

label: Pass if output matches (regex)
description: Runs a command and passes only if the output matches a regular expression.

label: Camera — list local webcams
description: Lists the webcams attached to this Maestro machine (via turbossh's ffmpeg).

label: Camera — local webcam photo
description: Takes a single still from a local webcam and attaches it to the report. Leave 'camera' blank to auto-pick the first one.

label: Camera — local webcam video
description: Records a short clip from a local webcam and attaches it to the report.

label: Camera — remote webcam photo (over SSH)
description: Takes a still from a webcam attached to the remote/RDP machine, over SSH, and attaches it.

label: RDP — remote desktop screenshot
description: Captures a screenshot of the remote Windows/RDP machine's screen over SSH and attaches it.

label: RDP — remote desktop recording
description: Records a short video of the remote Windows/RDP desktop over SSH and attaches it.
